    Serialized Form

    • Package photos.model

      • Class photos.model.Album

        class Album extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • name
            String name
            Album name shown in the user's album list.
          • photos
            List<Photo> photos
            Photos currently contained in this album.

      • Class photos.model.Photo

        class Photo extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • absolutePath
            String absolutePath
            Absolute file-system path to the image file. Immutable after construction.
          • caption
            String caption
            User-supplied description, empty string if none.
          • dateTaken
            Instant dateTaken
            Last-modified time of the file, used as the "date taken".
          • tags
            Set<Tag> tags
            Set of (type, value) tag pairs; insertion order preserved.

      • Class photos.model.Tag

        class Tag extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • name
            String name
            Tag type name, such as location or person.
          • value
            String value
            Tag value paired with the type name.

      • Class photos.model.User

        class User extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • albums
            List<Album> albums
            All albums owned by this user.
          • username
            String username
            Unique, case-sensitive login name.
